# Airbase (airbasemusic.com)

> Airbase is a Swedish trance producer and DJ (Jezper Söderlund), active since the mid-1990s. This is his official website.

## Key facts
- Real name: Jezper Söderlund
- Origin: Gothenburg, Sweden
- Genres: Trance, Progressive Trance
- Active since: mid-1990s
- 100+ releases across 14 aliases
- Co-creator of trance.nu
- Labels: Black Hole Recordings, Armada Music, In Trance We Trust, Platipus, Flashover, Anjunabeats, and more

## Aliases
Airbase, Ozone, Rah, The Scarab, Parc, Narthex, First & Andre, Mono, One Man Army, J., J.L.N.D., Jezper, Inner State, Loken

## Notable releases
- Escape (2006) - biggest hit
- Denial feat. Floria Ambra (2008) - most recognized vocal track
- Genie (2002) - breakout hit
- We Might Fall (2011) - debut album on Intuition Recordings
- Everything Else Could Wait (2026) - comeback single on Black Hole Recordings
- Widescreen (2005) - Sensation Belgium anthem (as First & Andre)

## Site structure
- / - Feed (notes, articles, release announcements)
- /discography - Complete discography with filters by alias and type
- /discography/{slug} - Individual release pages with tracklist, streaming links, compilation appearances
- /shows - Performance history
- /about - Biography
- /press - Press features and interviews
- /contact - Booking and contact info
- /feed.xml - RSS feed

## Contact
- Booking: dj@airbasemusic.com
- General: jezper@airbasemusic.com
